description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a conical orange body and a wide, square black base for stability. The cone features a single broad, silver-gray reflective stripe around its upper section, which is visibly worn and partially peeling. The orange surface of the cone shows significant signs of use, including dirt, scuff marks, and faded areas, especially near the base. The base itself is thick, flat, and appears to be made of heavy rubber, with a slightly textured surface and small red dots around the perimeter. The tip of the cone is rounded and solid, maintaining the orange color but with some minor surface wear. No logos, text, or other markings are visible on any side of the cone.
description: A worn orange traffic cone with a wide black rubber base and a single silver-gray reflective stripe, showing visible dirt and scuff marks.
description_view_0: The cone's reflective stripe is most visibly damaged and peeling, with prominent dirt marks on the orange surface and a clear view of the textured black base.
description_view_1: This view shows a slightly less damaged section of the reflective stripe, with some scuffing and a more uniform orange color on the cone's body.
description_view_2: The reflective stripe appears cracked but less peeled, and the orange surface has a large, dark smudge near the center.
description_view_3: The cone's surface is relatively clean compared to other views, with the reflective stripe mostly intact and the base appearing solid and stable.
attribute_reflective_stripes: One wide, silver-gray reflective stripe encircles the upper third of the cone, approximately 10 cm in width, with visible wear and peeling.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with minor surface wear but no attachments or holes.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, thick, and black, made of heavy rubber with a flat, slightly textured surface and small red dots around the edge for added grip.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the object.
attribute_condition: Worn and dirty, with visible scuff marks, fading, and peeling on the reflective stripe.
